items.desc_en: Trump's affinity for strongmen leaders made him an admirer of Erdogan, who amassed power in Turkey as its prime minister and in his 13th year as president.

items.title_zh: 前国际象棋冠军克拉姆尼克因作弊言论被禁赛

items.title_en: BTIG names an athleisure company, cybersecurity stock and more as its top picks for the second half of 2026
items.title_zh: BTIG 将运动休闲公司、网络安全股票等列为 2026 年下半年的首选
items.desc_en: The firm named 55 large- and small-cap stocks that it thinks are set to perform well in the next six months.
items.desc_zh: 该公司列出了 55 只大盘股和小盘股，认为这些股票将在未来六个月内表现良好。

items.title_en: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.desc_en: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.desc_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.title_en: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
items.title_zh: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯圣彼得堡主要石油码头
items.desc_en: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，目标是“为俄罗斯战争带来收入”的关键基础设施。

items.title_en: Dior dress, Adam Sandler and a man of honour: What we know about Taylor and Travis's wedding
items.title_zh: 迪奥礼服、亚当·桑德勒和一位荣誉人物：我们对泰勒和特拉维斯婚礼的了解
items.desc_en: The couple tied the knot in New York on Friday, after months of speculation about when, where and how it would happen.
items.desc_zh: 经过几个月对结婚时间、地点和方式的猜测，这对夫妇于周五在纽约喜结连理。

items.title_en: Trump to mark U.S. 250th anniversary with campaign-style rally on National Mall
items.title_zh: 特朗普在国家广场举行竞选式集会纪念美国建国250周年
items.desc_en: Washington's July 4 celebration attendees this year will have to contend with stepped-up ‌security, possible thunderstorms and temperatures that could top 100F.
items.desc_zh: 今年华盛顿 7 月 4 日庆祝活动的参加者将不得不应对加强的安全措施、可能的雷暴和可能高达 100 华氏度的气温。

items.title_en: Pope Leo urges U.S. to welcome immigrants in July 4 appeal
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥在 7 月 4 日呼吁中敦促美国欢迎移民
items.desc_en: Leo drew the ire of Donald Trump last year after calling the U.S. president's hardline anti-immigration policies inhumane.
items.desc_zh: 去年，利奥因称美国总统强硬的反移民政策不人道而引起了唐纳德·特朗普的愤怒。

items.title_en: Pope urges Europe to do more for migrants while visiting gateway island
items.title_zh: 教皇敦促欧洲在访问门户岛时为移民做更多事情
items.desc_en: The pontiff pays tribute to migrants who lost their lives at sea at a cemetery on the Italian island of Lampedusa.
items.desc_zh: 教宗向在意大利兰佩杜萨岛公墓中丧生的移民致敬。

items.title_en: Trump hails U.S. exceptionalism before veering into darkly political speech to usher in America's 250th anniversary
items.title_zh: 特朗普赞扬美国例外论，然后转向黑暗的政治演讲庆祝美国成立250周年
items.desc_en: The president's speech capped an Independence Day eve otherwise most notable for a brutal heat wave that gripped much of the eastern part of the country.
items.desc_zh: 总统的讲话为独立日前夕画上了圆满的句号，否则最引人注目的是席卷该国东部大部分地区的残酷热浪。

items.title_en: UK and France agree with Oman to ensure safety of its territorial waters
items.title_zh: 英国和法国同意阿曼确保其领海安全
items.desc_en: France said it has deployed mine countermeasures to the Middle East, including two mine-hunting ships.
items.desc_zh: 法国表示已在中东部署了反水雷措施，其中包括两艘猎雷船。

items.title_en: Large crowds gather in Tehran on first day of Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral
items.title_zh: 阿亚图拉哈梅内伊葬礼第一天，大量人群聚集在德黑兰
items.desc_en: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla until Monday, before travelling across Iran and Iraq.
items.desc_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊的遗体将在德黑兰大摩萨拉安放至周一，然后穿越伊朗和伊拉克。

items.title_en: From Macron to Modi, governments are rolling out the red carpet for AI giants
items.title_zh: 从马克龙到莫迪，各国政府正在为人工智能巨头铺上红地毯
items.desc_en: Macron and Modi are courting tech CEOs as France and India seek AI data center investment and cloud infrastructure.
items.desc_zh: 随着法国和印度寻求人工智能数据中心投资和云基础设施，马克龙和莫迪正在向科技首席执行官示好。

items.title_en: China’s military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks - NBC News
items.title_zh: 反腐清洗精简队伍后，中国军队提拔两名新将军 - NBC新闻
items.desc_en: China’s military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks  NBC NewsChina's military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks  NPRChina's Xi taps new milit
items.desc_zh: 反腐整肃后，中国军队提拔了两名新将军 NBC News 中国军队在反腐整肃后提拔了两名新将军 NPR中国习近平任命了新的军队

items.title_en: In pictures: Stars and fans celebrate Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding
items.title_zh: 图片中：明星和粉丝庆祝泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯的婚礼
items.desc_en: Celebrities and sports stars were spotted as the A-list couple tied the knot in New York on Friday.
items.desc_zh: 周五，这对一线明星夫妇在纽约喜结连理，众多名人和体育明星被拍到。

items.title_en: Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru's presidential election weeks after vote
items.title_zh: 投票几周后，藤森惠子宣布赢得秘鲁总统选举
items.desc_en: The daughter of disgraced president Alberto Fujimori is declared winner of tight race nearly a month after voting took place.
items.desc_zh: 投票结束近一个月后，名誉扫地的总统阿尔贝托·藤森的女儿在激烈的角逐中被宣布为获胜者。

items.title_en: 'Just married': Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tie the knot
items.title_zh: “刚刚结婚”：泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯喜结连理
items.desc_en: Comedian Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony, said the publicist's statement under the headline "Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Are Married!"
items.desc_zh: 喜剧演员亚当·桑德勒主持了仪式，公关人员在标题为“泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯结婚了！”的声明中说道。

items.title_en: Iran begins six-day funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei nearly four months after his death
items.title_zh: 伊朗在阿亚图拉哈梅内伊去世近四个月后开始为其举行为期六天的葬礼
items.desc_en: Iran plans a six-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, with ceremonies across Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗计划为阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊举行为期六天的葬礼，在伊朗和伊拉克各地举行仪式，然后在马什哈德举行葬礼。

items.title_en: Brutal heat cancels Fourth of July events, from DC to Philadelphia
items.title_zh: 酷热天气取消了从华盛顿到费城的国庆节活动
items.desc_en: More than 165 million people are enduring dangerous heat and humidity, with temperatures expected to stay at 38C (100F) for several days.
items.desc_zh: 超过 1.65 亿人正在忍受危险的高温和潮湿，预计气温将在数天内保持在 38 摄氏度（100 华氏度）。

items.title_en: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
items.title_zh: 泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 在亚当·桑德勒 (Adam Sandler) 主持的纽约婚礼上与特拉维斯·凯尔斯 (Travis Kelce) 结婚
items.desc_en: It was the bash of the century, with celebrities from singer Benson Boone and actor Hugh Grant to model Gigi Hadid and actor Ethan Hawke in attendence.
items.desc_zh: 这是本世纪的狂欢，歌手本森·布恩、演员休·格兰特、模特吉吉·哈迪德和演员伊桑·霍克等名人都出席了。

items.title_en: Row after Indian state drops eggs from school lunch menu
items.title_zh: 印度各州将鸡蛋从学校午餐菜单中剔除后引发争议
items.desc_en: West Bengal's move to replace eggs in some school meals has sparked a wider debate over nutrition and choice.
items.desc_zh: 西孟加拉邦在部分学校膳食中取代鸡蛋的举措引发了有关营养和选择的更广泛辩论。

items.title_en: Anguished families left to identify Venezuela quake victims at makeshift morgue
items.title_zh: 悲痛的家庭在临时太平间寻找委内瑞拉地震遇难者的身份
items.desc_en: The disaster has overwhelmed local services, with bodies put outside or in tents for identification.
items.desc_zh: 这场灾难使当地服务不堪重负，尸体被放在外面或帐篷里进行身份识别。

items.title_en: Feds seek lower prison term for $100 million New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
items.title_zh: 联邦调查局寻求降低新泽西熟食店诈骗犯身价1亿美元的刑期，但其中的一些原因却被隐藏
items.desc_en: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
items.desc_zh: 詹姆斯·彭定康 (James Patten) 是因与 Hometown International 相关的股票操纵计划而被判刑的第三人，该公司只拥有一家熟食店。

items.title_en: First known congressional SpaceX stock buys surface after record IPO
items.title_zh: 首次公开募股创纪录后，第一支已知的国会 SpaceX 股票被买入
items.desc_en: The SpaceX stock purchases come as Elon Musk’s company deepens its role in federal contracting and remains closely tied to President Donald Trump’s Washington.
items.desc_zh: 此次购买 SpaceX 股票之际，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的公司正在深化其在联邦合同领域的作用，并与唐纳德·特朗普总统的华盛顿保持密切联系。

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_en: Ukrainian woman named by Interpol as main suspect in Monaco bomb attack
items.title_zh: 国际刑警组织将乌克兰妇女列为摩纳哥炸弹袭击的主要嫌疑人
items.desc_en: Monaco's prosecutor's office says the suspect is no longer in Monaco.
items.desc_zh: 摩纳哥检察官办公室表示，嫌疑人已不在摩纳哥。

items.title_en: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
items.title_zh: 法国在热浪高峰期超额死亡 2,025 人，欧洲正准备迎接更极端的天气
items.desc_en: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.
items.desc_zh: 预报员警告未来几天非洲大陆将出现进一步的极端气温。

items.title_en: President Donald Trump defends business dealings, his children in exclusive interview with CNBC
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在接受 CNBC 独家采访时为商业交易和他的孩子们辩护
items.desc_en: Trump spoke with CNBC as he prepares to celebrate the 250th birthday of the U.S. on July 4 with an event and fireworks on the National Mall in Washington.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，他准备于 7 月 4 日在华盛顿国家广场举行活动并燃放烟花来庆祝美国 250 岁生日。

items.title_en: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统接受 CNBC 采访的 5 个要点
items.desc_en: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.
items.desc_zh: 总统为其家族企业进行了辩护，并表示，他对总统任期给他孩子的任何投资造成利益冲突感到难过。

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能

items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028

items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.desc_zh: 该应用程序的新用户名功能将在未来几个月内在全球推出。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers

items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？
